summary: Contractor Ratings System - Complete Testing. Backend APIs (9/9 tests passed): GET /contractors/{id}/reviews, GET /contractors/leaderboard, POST /bookings/{id}/review. Frontend components fully tested: ContractorLeaderboard (displays top-rated contractors), ContractorReviews (shows rating summary and distribution), ContractorReview modal (star rating selection, text input, submission), PendingReviews (displays completed bookings needing reviews on dashboard).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/contractors/leaderboard returns empty array when no ratings (correct behavior)
Backend: GET /api/contractors/leaderboard respects limit parameter
Backend: GET /api/contractors/{id}/reviews returns empty array for contractor without reviews
Backend: POST /api/bookings/{id}/review returns 404 for non-existent booking
Backend: Full review flow - create booking → complete → review → verify rating update
Backend: POST /api/bookings/{id}/review returns 403 for unauthorized user
Backend: GET /api/bookings/customer/{id} returns bookings list
Backend: GET /api/contractors/search returns contractors
Backend: GET /api/contractors/search?specialty=plumbing filters by specialty
Frontend: ContractorLeaderboard shows on contractor marketplace sidebar
Frontend: ContractorLeaderboard displays 'Top Contractors' header with trophy icon
Frontend: ContractorLeaderboard shows contractors with ratings and review counts
Frontend: ContractorReviews component loads in contractor detail modal
Frontend: ContractorReviews shows 'Customer Reviews' section header
Frontend: ContractorReviews displays overall rating (e.g., 5.0)
Frontend: ContractorReviews shows rating distribution bars (1-5 stars)
Frontend: ContractorReviews shows individual review items with customer names
Frontend: ContractorReviews shows 'No reviews yet' for contractors without reviews
Frontend: PendingReviews shows on renter dashboard when completed bookings exist
Frontend: PendingReviews displays 'Share Your Experience' header
Frontend: PendingReviews shows completed booking items with Review button
Frontend: Review modal opens when clicking review button/item
Frontend: Review modal shows contractor name and service title
Frontend: Star rating selection works (clickable, visual feedback with labels)
Frontend: Review text input accepts text with character counter
Frontend: Submit Review button submits the review
Frontend: Success screen shows after submission with 'Thank You!' message
Frontend: Done button closes success modal
Frontend: PendingReviews hides when all reviews are submitted
Frontend: Review submission updates contractor's average rating in leaderboard
critical_code_review_comments: ContractorReview component properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
ContractorReviews component correctly handles empty state with 'No reviews yet' message
ContractorLeaderboard properly sorts by rating and review_count
PendingReviews correctly filters for completed bookings without ratings
Review submission flow updates contractor's rating in database
All components use proper REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings for review testing (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested the new Contractor Ratings System. Key components: 1) ContractorReview.jsx - review submission modal with star rating and text input. 2) ContractorReviews.jsx - displays rating summary, distribution bars, and individual reviews. 3) ContractorLeaderboard.jsx - shows top-rated contractors with medal icons. 4) PendingReviews.jsx - shows completed bookings needing reviews on dashboard. Backend endpoints: GET /contractors/{id}/reviews, GET /contractors/leaderboard, POST /bookings/{id}/review. All features working correctly.

Backend_Review_APIs.notes: Full CRUD operations working, rating calculation updates contractor profile
